summary: Base W12 — the §10 test week (~14 mpw + race). Fri's 5K TT locks the goal tier (≤21:30 = sub-20 trajectory) and formally recalibrates T pace after five straight T sessions quick of the 7:50–7:55 nudge. Run volume is deliberately light around the race: Mon 30 min easy, Wed 30 min + 4 strides, Sat 30 min easy day-after. Lifts carry the biggest bump slate of the cycle out of W11 Sat's three cleared gates: Tue Hyp A = rear-delt 135 (Adj #130), decline crunch add-load (Adj #131), pushdown 25 re-attempt pain-gated (Adj #136), plus the §5 incline AMRAP/TM re-test due ~W12 (Adj #126); Sat Hyp B = lat pulldown 165 (Adj #133), DB lateral 35 (Adj #137), Sat decline crunch add-load (Adj #138). Seated calf holds its landed 345 (zero headroom, Adj #135); preacher Sat holds 60 (Adj #139). Elbow §10.A clock running from 7-4. Watch: recheck AM Achilles before Mon's run — Sat's 4×12-to-failure calf dose was the biggest of the cycle with during/post not reported (Adj #135). W11 closed with gaps: Wed/Fri runs never reported, Sat long skipped (Adj #141).

days.note: §4.C W12 test-week opener — honest-easy 9:45–10:45/mi, no strides. Recheck AM Achilles first: Sat's seated-calf 345 landed as the biggest calf dose of the cycle with during/post not reported (Adj #135).

Bumps: rear-delt fly 130→135 (Adj #130); decline crunch add ~10 lb DB / 25 lb plate at 3×12 (Adj #131); pushdown 22.5→25 re-attempt eligible, pain-gated (Adj #136). Incline §5 AMRAP/TM re-test due ~W12 (Adj #126). Preacher Tue slot 65 (Adj #128). Keep it clean of Fri — TT week.
§4.C W12 pre-TT sharpener — flat strides, cadence cap ≤180 (Adj #25/#62). Easy portion honest 9:45–10:45/mi.
Permanent off (Adj #92) — mobility / walk + daily SI prehab. Rest before the TT.

Goal tier locks here: ≤21:30 = sub-20 trajectory; 21:31–22:30 = downgrade to 20:59; >22:30 = downgrade to 21:30. Flat course or treadmill 1%, racing intent. Also formally recalibrates T pace (Adj #77/#93/#125). Full warmup; do not renegotiate the tier later.

days.session: Z1 easy 30 min (day-after) + Hyp B PM
days.note: Bumps: lat pulldown 160→165 on a clean set 3 (Adj #133); DB lateral 30→35 (Adj #137); decline crunch add small load at 3×10 (Adj #138). Holds: seated calf 345 zero-headroom (Adj #135); preacher Sat 60 — 65 needs a full clean outing (Adj #139); pushdown 25 if not attempted Tue, pain-gated (Adj #136); chest fly 130 (Adj #140). Run is a 30-min shakeout, truly easy.
Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1 pyramid, daily SI prehab.
